title: Looming/receding PPS during arm movement, Experiment 2
citation: Barumerli, R., Geronazzo, M., & Cesari, P. (2026). Somatotopy-independent reduction of audio-tactile intersensory facilitation for looming sounds within the peripersonal space during arm movements execution. Scientific Reports.
notes: Experiment 2 extends auditory duration to 4000 ms and includes all five tactile delays in unisensory baseline blocks.

provenance.source: Methods report 10 trials for each 2 sound directions x 5 distances plus 10 catch trials per audio-tactile block.
Methods report T1-T5 as 800, 1300, 2000, 2700, and 3200 ms.
